model_specification_line: sm.WLS(y, X, weights=perwt/100).fit() where X includes: const, daca_eligible, post_2012, daca_x_post (treatment effect), UNEMP, LFPR, male, age, and state fixed effects
outcome_definition: fulltime = 1 if UHRSWORK >= 35 (usually working 35+ hours per week), 0 otherwise
sample_selection: Citizenship: CITIZEN in [3,4,5] (Noncitizen or status not reported)
DACA eligibility criteria: Arrived before age 16 (YRIMMIG<=1996) AND born after 1981
treatment_definition: daca_eligible = 1 if arrived unlawfully before age 16 (by June 1996) AND not yet age 31 as of June 2012 (born after June 1981), 0 otherwise
